title: Single cell genotyping of Myeloid Leukaemia of Down Syndrome cells
author: Catherine Garnett
content: E-MTAB-7935 Single cell genotyping of Myeloid Leukaemia of Down Syndrome cells Human - Single-cell sequencing DNA-seq EFO EFO_0002693 Homo sapiens Single cells from ML-DS sample 186-2 (bone marrow) were analysed to determine whether mutations in  JAK2 and CSF2RB ocurred in the same or different
